openGraph.title: The Local Growth Brief
openGraph.description: Weekly practical notes for local business owners who want cleaner campaigns and better landing pages.

campaigns.label: Instagram bio
campaigns.notes: Use as the public profile link during the launch week.

campaigns.label: LinkedIn post
campaigns.notes: Use in the first founder announcement post.

campaigns.label: Partner footer
campaigns.notes: Give to trusted partner sites as a tagged resource link.

openGraphChecklist: Description states who the newsletter is for
Share image is 1200 by 630 pixels or equivalent ratio
Canonical URL matches the live newsletter landing page
Signup CTA appears before the first scroll on mobile
